subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the light of guidance! Raise thou both hands in thanksgiving unto the threshold of the one true God, and render praise, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بنور هدی دو دست شکرانه بدرگاه خداوند یگانه بلند نما و ستایش نما که
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
